DESCRIPTION:
An incorrectly initialized framework dependency should be treated as a test
defect because the product under test was never exercised.
NAME: frameworkDependencyMustBeInitializedBeforeExecution()

DESCRIPTION: Categories split flaky, test and product failures so each bucket has an owner.
NAME: categoriesPutSpecificFlakyRuleBeforeGenericBuckets()

DESCRIPTION:
Certain validation suites may be intentionally skipped until their external
dependencies become available.
NAME: reportingIntegrationRequiresDedicatedEnvironment()

DESCRIPTION:
A completed order must expose a tracking reference to downstream consumers.
Missing business data indicates a product defect.
NAME: completedOrderShouldExposeTrackingReference()

DESCRIPTION: The leadership view is the Overview page once categories, history, severity and environment exist.
NAME: executiveViewNeedsFourSignals()

DESCRIPTION: Environment metadata answers which browser, base URL and build produced the report.
NAME: environmentTemplateCarriesRunContext()
